text: Multitasking Work with multiple windows Drag windows to the sides or corners of your screen and theyl automatically size to fit perfectly, side by side. Snap windows @ on When | snap a window, automatically size it to fill available space When | snap a window, show what | can snap next to it When | resize a snapped window, simultaneously resize any adjacent snapped window Timeline Show suggestions in your timeline @ on Alt + Tab Pressing Alt + Tab shows Open windows and 5 most recent tabs in apps Virtual desktops On the taskbar, show windows that are open on Only the desktop I'm using v
